data.description: OKX market data shows that BTC fell below 84,000 USDT and is now at 83,986.1 USDT, a 24-hour drop of 1.57%. (This newsletter is generated with the assistance of AI)

data.title: Curve Finance clocks $35B trading volume in Q1 2025
data.description:
Curve Finance, a decentralized lending protocol and exchange, notched record-breaking trading volumes of nearly $35 billion in the first quarter of 2025, a spokesperson for the protocol told Cointelegraph.  Trading volumes increased more than 13% from the first quarter of 2024, largely due to a surge in transactions, from around 1. 8 million to some 5. 5 million in Q1 2025, Curve said
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/curve-finance-clocks-record-trading-volume-q1-2025?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: Bitcoin dips as Trump declares economic ‘Liberation Day’ with sweeping tariffs
data.description:
Trump announces extensive tariffs to revive domestic manufacturing; major ETFs drop while Bitcoin sees slight decline amid market uncertainty.
source: https://www.thestreet.com/crypto/policy/bitcoin-dips-as-trump-declares-economic-liberation-day-with-sweeping-tariffs

data.title: Fidelity launches crypto IRAs, allowing retirement investment in Bitcoin, Ether, and Litecoin
data.description:
Fidelity Investments has introduced an IRA that permits private investors to invest in cryptocurrencies under its web3-focused subsidiary, Fidelity Digital Assets.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/fidelity-launches-crypto-iras/

data.title: US Treasury Sanctions Tron Wallets That Used Tether to Support Houthis
data.description:
Eight crypto wallets used by financial facilitators of the Houthis were identified and sanctioned by the United States Treasury.
source: https://decrypt.co/312999/us-treasury-sanctions-tron-wallets-tehter-houthis

data.title: Elon Musk debunks rumors of leaving D.O.G.E as Judge denies access to personal Social Security data
data.description:
Elon Musk on Wednesday called the media report claiming he plans to leave the Department of Government Efficiency “fake news,” after Politico reported that Donald Trump had told people inside the White House that Elon could soon return full-time to Tesla. The same day, Tesla’s stock jumped by 5. 9% after the article came out, even […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/elon-musk-debunks-rumors-of-leaving-d-o-g-e/

data.title: Ethereum price may have bottomed, but pro traders show little interest in buying ETH
data.description:
Ether (ETH) price has risen 6. 4% from its March 30 $1,768 low but the altcoin has struggled to regain the $2,000 level. Some traders believe that the downturn is partially connected to the deflating memecoin market, which, while not exclusive to the Ethereum network, significantly reduced activity across the decentralized applications (DApps) ecosystem and broader crypto space. Ether is currently 44% down year-to-date, and derivatives metrics indicate that traders are far from bullish and show little confidence in a strong recovery in the near term
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/ethereum-price-may-have-bottomed-but-pro-traders-show-little-interest-in-buying-eth?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: White House Announces Implementation Dates for Tariff Rates
data.description: According to Odaily, a senior White House official has announced that the benchmark tariff rate of 10% will take effect on April 5 at midnight UTC+8. The reciprocal tariffs are set to be implemented on April 9 at midnight UTC+8.

data.description: On Apr 02, 2025, 21:07 PM(UTC). According to Binance Market Data, Bitcoin has dropped below 85,000 USDT and is now trading at 84,812.34375 USDT, with a narrowed 0.54% decrease in 24 hours.
